name: NAVIGATE ESUS
fullName: Rivaroxaban for Stroke Prevention after Embolic Stroke of Undetermined Source
teachingPoint: Rivaroxaban not superior to aspirin in ESUS and more bleeding — empiric anticoagulation not indicated.

name: RE-SPECT ESUS
fullName: Dabigatran for Prevention of Stroke after Embolic Stroke of Undetermined Source
teachingPoint: Dabigatran not superior to aspirin in ESUS — confirms NAVIGATE; no empiric DOAC.

name: ARCADIA
fullName: Apixaban to Prevent Recurrence after Cryptogenic Stroke in Patients with Atrial Cardiopathy
teachingPoint: Apixaban no better than aspirin in atrial-cardiopathy ESUS — atrial cardiopathy alone does not justify anticoagulation.
